name: Fluffy Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of a 9 1/2 inch spring form pan with both packages of lady fingers.
2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and half a can of pineapple in a bowl until well combined using an electric mixer for about 1 1/2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining pineapple to the mixture and stir until thoroughly combined.
4. Fold in all of the Cool Whip into the mixture.
5. Pour the entire mixture over the lady fingers.
6. Refrigerate for 5 or 6 hours before serving.
NOTE: This recipe takes just a few minutes to prepare and requires no cooking.
